title: Labor Rights Reference Index — Topic-Organized Navigation for 509dds Stewards
description: Topic-organized navigation index mapping steward/member use-cases to specific source files in the labor-rights folder. Covers 11 enforcement agencies (DLR, MCAD, AGO Fair Labor, DLS, DIA, CSC, State Ethics, EEOC, DOL WHD, OSHA, NLRB) plus DFML/PFML and earned-sick-time cross-cuts, with per-use-case file lookups (discipline, discrimination, wages, safety, civil-service, retaliation, family/medical leave). Also documents four known scrape gaps (personnel records, PWFA dedicated page, DLR charge-form PDFs, NLRB Boston regional detail).
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts; federal agencies where dual-jurisdiction applies

source.publisher: SEIU Local 509 / DDS chapter (synthesized from MA & federal agency scrapes)

license: © SEIU Local 509 / DDS chapter; free to redistribute with attribution (per folder README)
notes: Synthesized navigation index — not legal advice. Human-readable table of contents for the folder; read alongside agencies.json for app integrations. Scrape gaps are flagged at the end of the document.
